name: GOLFTEC Fort Collins South
address: 4700 Mcmurry Ave STE 108, Fort Collins, CO 80525
about: GOLFTEC is a golf instruction and club fitting center that uses technology to help golfers improve their game. They offer personalized coaching sessions using advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis to identify swing issues. The facilities include indoor training bays equipped with launch monitors for data-driven feedback, aiming to accelerate improvement for golfers of all skill levels. Club fitting services are also available, with fittings starting at $95, utilizing launch monitors and shaft optimization to match players with the right equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized coaching plans tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Access to advanced simulator technology for practice and play in virtual environments
Custom club fitting services with data-optimized equipment recommendations
Consistent and measurable improvement with structured lesson programs

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology mentioned for club fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice, including clubs for fitting sessions. You can also bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted at GOLFTEC locations. The facilities do not offer food or alcohol service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play times vary depending on the number of players and pace of play. A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is equipped to work with young golfers of various skill levels, making it suitable for families and youth players.
